actions.description: Log in using {{email}} and {{password}} from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Wait for the input field with selector `input[name='profile.display_name']` to be visible
actions.description: Wait for the input field with name 'profile.display_name' to be visible

actions.instruction: Clear the input field with selector `input[name='profile.display_name']`
actions.description: Clear the input field for the display name

actions.instruction: Type "Updated Display Name" into the input field with selector `input[name='profile.display_name']`
actions.description: Fill the display name input field with the new value 'Updated Display Name'

actions.instruction: Click the button with text "Save" or type "submit"
actions.description: Click the button with text 'Save' to submit the form

actions.instruction: Wait for the success message or toast to appear
actions.description: Wait for a success toast or confirmation message to appear

actions.instruction: Wait for the input field with selector `input[name='profile.display_name']` to be visible after reload
actions.description: Wait for the input field with name 'profile.display_name' to be visible after reload

actions.instruction: Verify the input field with selector `input[name='profile.display_name']` contains "Updated Display Name"
actions.description: Verify the input field with selector 'input[name="profile.display_name"]' contains 'Updated Display Name'
